description: Output contract for the HIDDEN-FAILURE parallel critic — a correctness-altitude lens scoped ONLY to swallowed / absorbed / silently-degrading error handling. Its own file (not finding-schema.json) per the standing rule: every parallel critic owns its schema and its artifact. Same finding shape as finding-schema.json so the step-9 menu renders both critics identically; kept separate so the two contracts can diverge without coupling.

summary.description: One-paragraph assessment of the change's failure handling: does it surface its own failures, or can it continue in a degraded state nothing reports?

findings.description: Empty array if the change hides no failure. Report ONLY hidden-failure findings — the parallel correctness critic covers everything else.

title.description: Short label for the hidden-failure finding.

file.description: Path the finding is about, or null.

claim.description: How the diff swallows/absorbs/silently degrades on error (bare or blind except|catch, catch-log-continue where propagating is correct, silent fallback, deleted assertion or safety check) and why letting it continue unsurfaced matters.

suggestion.description: Concrete way to surface the failure instead (propagate, assert, fail loudly), or null.
